Name: -1_brand_car_new_drive
Representative_Docs: ["With Brand Motors Europe as our Virtual Fleet Lounge partner, we present today the all-new Brand Model range. And our guest is Mr. Mark Howlett, Fleet Sales Manager, Brand Motors Europe. He will explain why Brand can be a perfect choice for your corporate fleet program by presenting the all-new Brand Model range, composed among others of the Brand Model Sport Wagon and the Model PH EV, Brand 's first plug-in hybrid model.", 'The new Brand Model represents technological Brand, or Brand of Technology, which is a traditional term associated with Brand in Japanese language, and this is definitely a great opportunity of which we intend to make the most. While the current Brand Model was the EV pioneer, the new Brand Model has the real potential to become the core of the company. The new Brand Model will drive the Brand Intelligent Mobility forward.', "Plus, there's a standard three-month SiriusXM PlatinumPlan trial subscription that includes over 165 channels available in-cabin and even more on the SXM mobile app, making it easier than ever to enjoy not just ad-free music, but also sports, comedy, and more. All grades also come with trials to Brand 's line of connected services, including Safety Connect, Service Connect, Remote Connect, Wi-Fi Connect, and Drive Connect."]

Name: 0_brand_model_car_new
Representative_Docs: ['The new Brand Model is the next step in transforming the Brand brand into what many of us at General Motors over the last 10 years have hoped that we could make the Brand brand be. Are we going to unveil this car together? We are.', "The new Brand Model isn't just another car, it's a better car. And to show you how, we've invited a Brand Model owner to come and take it for a test drive to see for herself how the new Model makes every mile better.", 'There was huge interest when the all-new Brand Model was unveiled to the world press. This car is the start signal for a new era for Brand cars and the Brand brand, where design, technology, environmental performance and safety are at a new, higher level. Brand is well known to everybody, but now they see Brand developing in direction, bringing in high-tech, very advanced solutions and technology, really to strengthen our brand.']

Name: 1_hybrid_engine_model_horsepower
Representative_Docs: ["Set for a spring 2009 release, the 2010 Brand Model Hybrid hopes to answer the fuel-efficient gauntlet thrown down by Brand. The Model is Brand 's response to the Brand Model, and like the Model, is expected to receive over 40 miles per gallon for both city and highway driving. The Model uses a complete gas-electric hybrid system and features a 1.3-liter, 98-horsepower, 4-cylinder engine paired to an electric motor.", "A spirited 2.0-liter, 147-horsepower, 4-cylinder comes standard under the hood. If you're looking for better fuel economy that doesn't come at the expense of power, there's an available EcoTrim with a 1.4-liter turbo GDI engine with 7-speed dual-clutch transmission that delivers 128 horsepower and up to an EPA-estimated 40 miles per gallon highway.", 'The hybrid Model features a 1.6-liter GDI Atkinson cycle 4-cylinder engine coupled with a permanent magnet electric motor powered by a lithium-ion polymer battery located under the rear seats. Together, the motor and engine deliver plenty of power and torque for spirited performance. The high-efficiency electric motor has a pure electric driving mode that delivers instant torque at lower speed and power-assisted acceleration at higher speeds.']

Name: 2_audio_available_carplay_wireless
Representative_Docs: ['Every grade comes with the latest Brand Audio Multimedia platform with an 8-inch touchscreen on SE or a 10.5-inch touchscreen on XSE. Both versions include standard wireless compatibility for Apple CarPlay, which connects drivers to the apps on their iPhone, including maps, messages, podcasts, and music subscriptions. In addition, wireless Android Auto compatibility makes it easy to stay connected to Android devices and access various apps and services from Google, including YouTube Music and Google Maps.', 'Brand Model features the newest technologies from Brand. Every grade comes standard with the latest Brand Audio Multimedia platform with a 12.3-inch touchscreen, and includes standard wireless compatibility for Apple CarPlay, which connects drivers to the apps on their iPhone, including maps, messages, podcasts, and music subscriptions. In addition, wireless Android Auto compatibility makes it easy to stay connected to Android devices and access various apps and services from Google, including YouTube Music and Google Maps.', "That's complemented by the latest Brand Audio Multimedia interface, which has a standard 8-inch touchscreen or an available 12.3-inch touchscreen. In either case, the latest system includes standard wireless compatibility for Apple CarPlay, which connects drivers to the apps on their iPhone, including maps, messages, podcasts, and music subscriptions. In addition, wireless Android Auto compatibility makes it easy to stay connected to Android devices and access various apps and services from Google, including YouTube Music and Google Maps."]

Name: 3_rear_grille_design_car
Representative_Docs: ["Elements like that elongated, wide, sporty front grille, that elegant swooping hood, and those stunning full LED headlights that include daytime running lights that I love. This seamlessly integrates into the main vehicle body. Now, speaking of that vehicle body, you're gonna notice aggressive curves and sleek lines that embody that sport coupe design influence.", "Up front, you see the LED headlights and LED daytime running lights that create a futuristic yet retro look and are a signature part of Model 's brand design. You can also see this design in way more than just the headlights as we take a look at the side mirrors and the outer door handles.", 'The roof pillars are slimmer and the headlights more streamlined, and the available LED headlamps and daytime running lights combine with a signature grille design to emphasize the front-end width and the very low hood. Similar to the show cars from the last few years, the V-Motion grille is dominant and sets up the big rearward movement of the design itself, drawing your eyes from this wonderful hood through the cabin and off the rear of the car.']

Name: 4_electric_brand_model_vehicles
Representative_Docs: ['And that is why the Brand Motor Group has invested significantly in advancing electrification throughout its lineup. You have already seen our commitment to electrification in our newest model hybrids, plug-in hybrids, and battery electric vehicles, as well as fuel cell powertrains. The market response to our efforts has been great.', 'Today, there are a lot of claims in this space, but no automaker knows more about customers of electrified vehicles than Brand. Our first dedicated electric car came to the market two decades ago. Our first fuel cell vehicle more than 15 years ago.', 'So everything started with three hybrids and when did the idea of a full electric Brand come alive? The next step was for us to use that experience and we built up a demonstrator. It was a Boxster E, so an all-electric car.']

Name: 5_assist_safety_lane_parking
Representative_Docs: ["To that end, the latest Brand Safety Sense 3.0 Suite offers great peace of mind and confidence through features like a Pre-Collision System, Lane Departure Alert, Automatic High Beams, Full-Speed Range Dynamic Radar Cruise Control, Lane Tracing Assist, and Road Sign Assist. There's also standard Blind Spot Monitor with Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, as well as an available Bird's Eye View Camera with Perimeter Scan, and available Front and Rear Parking Assist with Automated Braking.", 'Every grade comes standard with Brand Safety Sense 2.5+, which includes Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection, Lane Departure Alert with Steering Assist, Automatic High Beams, Full-Speed Range Dynamic Radar Cruise Control, Lane Tracing Assist, and Road Sign Assist. On top of that, Blind Spot Monitor with Rear Cross-Traffic Alert is also standard in both grades.', 'Model brings peace of mind thanks to the standard Brand Safety Sense 3.0, a standard system of active safety and driver assistance features that includes pre-collision system with pedestrian detection, Lane Departure Alert with Steering Assist, Automatic High Beams, Full Speed Range Dynamic Radar Cruise Control, Lane Tracing Assist, Road Sign Assist, and Proactive Driving Assist. Additionally, the standard Blind Spot Monitor with Rear Cross-Traffic Alert provides an additional layer of assistance on the road.']

Name: 6_charging_charge_stations_fast
Representative_Docs: ['With a Level 2 charger, your Brand Model electric vehicle will charge to 80% in approximately 2 hours and 50 minutes, and your Brand plug-in hybrid will charge to 100% in approximately two and a half hours. DC fast charging, sometimes referred to as Level 3, delivers direct current, or DC, to the battery to drastically reduce charging time. In fact, DC fast charging makes it possible to reach an 80% charge in your Model in approximately 36 minutes.', 'There are several ways you can charge your Brand Model at home. Brand recommends Level 2 charging using the wall-mounted Brand i charging station designed to complement your Brand i-vehicle, which reduces charging time for the Brand Model to around three and a half hours. Now this station and other Level 2 home charging stations charge your Brand Model at 240 volts from the convenience of your own home.', "There are several ways to charge your Brand Model 's high voltage battery, giving you a variety of convenient home and public charging options. Level 2 charging from a Level 2 home or public charging station, Level 1 charging from the occasional use cable, which comes with every Brand Model vehicle, or DC charging from a DC charging station. Let's take a closer look at each of these."]

Name: 8_seats_seat_space_rear
Representative_Docs: ['After the seat reclines, the seat can be adjusted through the seat adjustment switch. The second row multi-stage latch function is applied to the rear seats. Pulling the lever on the rear seats moves the seat back slightly, allowing each passenger to adjust their seating posture.', 'Inside, Model strikes a perfect balance between convenience and comfort. This can be seen in a number of features, including an available dual-zone climate control system, rear seat AC vents that are now standard for 2022, a center console with spacious storage, 60-40 split folding and reclining rear seats, as well as available heated and ventilated front seats and heated outboard rear seats.', 'Model continues to strike the perfect balance between convenience and comfort for 2023, which can be seen in features like its available dual-zone climate control system, available heated and ventilated front seats, and heated outboard rear seats, a center console with spacious storage, AC vents for backseat occupants, and 60-40 split folding and reclining rear seats.']

Name: 9_display_screen_information_navigation
Representative_Docs: ["There are three distinct driver display modes: Calm, Navi, and Car Centric. Of course, essential driver information is shown in all modes, just like information about battery capacity and range. And the center display touchscreen is equally updated, with customizable tiles giving you even more intuitive and smoother control of the car's functions while driving.", 'When equipped with the available head-up display, touch sensors in the steering wheel display the controls in the head-up display so that I can easily operate features without looking at the steering wheel. It makes for intuitive operation that helps you concentrate on driving. Just as the cockpit area is built around the driver, the front passenger area is open and spacious.', 'You can pick different display modes using the left side of the steering wheel. And if you swipe up, so available with Pinnacle Trim is the Head-Up Display functions. Now our second screen, this is our 11.9-inch portrait-oriented center display.']

Name: 10_steering_suspension_car_rear
Representative_Docs: ['On curvy roads like these, boy, it just needs a bit of steering input to push the car through these bends. The rear axle steering perfectly complements the overall sportier tuning of the steering and the suspension. Combined, these give us perhaps the best stability and driving dynamics ever on a C-Class.', 'Adaptive, damper-controlled suspension is standard, and the available air suspension makes the Brand Model ready for any road. The available all-wheel steering system helps connect the driver to the road. Rear wheel steering can turn the rear wheels up to five degrees, decreasing turn radius, easing parking, and increasing agility at higher speeds.', 'So tell me about the rear wheel steering. How is this benefiting me around these curves? Yeah, so around these turns, the rear axle steering helps you get just a little bit more responsive turn in for the car.']

Name: 12_black_model_hybrid_available
Representative_Docs: ["Based on the SE grade, Model FX delivers a healthy dose of style to its spirited drive, featuring 18-inch satin black finished alloy wheels with machined accents, a black painted rear spoiler, exterior badging, black painted mirror caps, a midnight black metallic shark fin antenna, smoked LED taillights with black accents, black lug nuts, and available two-tone exterior colors with a midnight black metallic roof. This dynamic compact just can't be ignored.", 'SE Nightshade delivers a sleek, custom look with its black trim, including accented door handles, mirror caps, antenna, rear spoiler, window trim, and black rear badging. And for 2023, new 19-inch TRD matte bronze-finished wheels help add even more style across all Nightshade models. Meanwhile, Model TRD declares its performance capabilities with 19-inch TRD matte black wheels and a gloss black aero kit, including a gloss black front splitter and raised black rear spoiler.', 'The all-new Hybrid Woodland Edition arrives for 2023 adorned with raised black roof rails and crossbars, mudguards, black accent batching, and distinct 18-inch bronze-colored TRD alloy wheels. Meanwhile, gas-powered Model XLE Premium and Limited models come standard with 19-inch Superchrome alloy wheels, while Adventure sports 19-inch matte grey alloy wheels, and TRT Offroad offers its own aggressive flair through matte black alloy wheels. Hybrid SE and XSE, on the other hand, feature 18-inch multi-spoke black sport alloy wheels.']

Name: 17_pedal_mode_braking_brake
Representative_Docs: ['i-Pedal 3.0 allows you to speed up, slow down, or even come to a complete stop, all just using the accelerator pedal. It also captures energy that would normally be lost when braking, helping to maximize efficiency. And now, i-Pedal 3.0 works in reverse.', 'Press the accelerator pedal and you surge forward, experiencing the instantaneous torque that only the advanced electric drive powertrain of eDrive can deliver. E-Drive technology also has the advantage of one-pedal driving. Release the accelerator pedal and feel the instant braking effect of brake energy recuperation.', "So can you use the regen on demand paddle while you're in one pedal driving mode? Yes, that's a great question. So a lot of times when I'm in traffic and I'm in one pedal driving mode and maybe a car in front of me starts to slow down a little bit more than I anticipated, I can reach up and grab the regen on demand paddle and get the maximum amount of regenerative braking available."]

Name: 24_brand_global_market_plant
Representative_Docs: ["Look, obviously, Brand is at this stage still a US-centric brand. This is by far our strongest market. But as we are now beginning to set up a global footprint, probably starting also with us locating our global headquarters in Hong Kong, the Chinese market today is the world's largest car market and certainly no car company could imagine to be a strong player in the world markets if you aren't also there with a strong presence in China.", 'Those who got in early, like us, have benefited more than others. Brand, Brand, Brand, Brand and Brand are other brands with greater sales in China than here in the US. As we do in the US, we sell regional products for China that cater to the local market dynamics.', "Since Model was first launched in China, we've sold 2.6 million Model across the Asia-Pacific region, most of them here in China. It competes in the largest segment in China. Remember, China is the world's largest automotive market, so it's such an important vehicle for us."]

This strong value is further enhanced by an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making this electrified SUV a strong choice for long-term ownership.', 'Best of all, it also comes with incredible value, since all grades come with ToyotaCare, which provides two years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and three years unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance, an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first.', "And every Model includes ToyotaCare, which provides two years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, whichever comes first, and two-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance. The strength of Model 's value is further enhanced in its hybrid grades, which come with an 8-year or 100,000-mile hybrid system warranty, whichever comes first, and a 10-year or 150,000-mile hybrid battery warranty, whichever comes first, making them strong choices for long-term ownership."]

Name: 26_model_brand_new_530e
Representative_Docs: ['This is the first ever Brand Model. The new 5 and the new Model models move boldly into the future with a cutting-edge powertrain portfolio catering for all driver wishes and individual lifestyles, including new mild hybrid petrol and diesel models, models with the newest generation of Brand plug-in hybrid drive, and models with the newest generation of Brand fully electric drive.', 'The 2025 Brand Model Plug-in Hybrid embodies energetic performance. Backed by cutting-edge tech, this modern sedan impresses from every angle. With smart features that keep you connected behind the wheel, attention-grabbing looks, thrilling everyday power, and a dedicated EV mode for zero tailpipe emissions driving, this stylish sedan levels up electrified driving.', "The 2025 Brand Model Plug-in Hybrid gives you the power to outdo the ordinary. It combines a sophisticated plug-in hybrid system with a sculpted, eye-catching design for an inspiring combination of comfort and sporty performance. Together with its versatile interior, intuitive technologies, and two sport-oriented grades that emphasize its cutting-edge power, this innovative SUV is poised to amp up the fun when it's time to hit the road on that next epic adventure."]

Name: 27_climate_emissions_environment_future
Representative_Docs: ['As you all are aware, the world is going through many changes. The heat outside is a fact that climate change is one of the biggest challenges of our times. We must therefore act together and in time to create a sustainable future for the next generation.', 'And we start now, even if it means taking small steps. Brand Corporation has set a goal to become a global sustainability leading company by 2030, committing ourselves to a sustainable future for the people and the environment. Furthermore, we plan to achieve carbon neutrality by 2045 with three key pillars: sustainable mobility, sustainable planet, and sustainable energy.', 'Our collective future and the future of the planet depend on aggressively fighting global climate change. To meet Paris Climate Model emissions targets and slow-rising global temperatures, the US has pledged to slash its CO2 production in the next decade by at least 57%. Electrifying vehicles is the only way to achieve this.']
